notes: Market size figures for AI-driven battery technology vary widely ($3.58B-$83B) across reports due to different scope definitions. This report uses the AI-specific battery technology segment ($3.58B from The Business Research Company, Jan 2026) as the primary market size figure, not the broader BESS market. The '52% US growth' figure (Wood Mackenzie/ACP) measures GW power capacity; SEIA's '30% growth' figure measures GWh energy capacity — both are correct on their own terms. The Google-Xcel 30 GWh iron-air deal and Form Energy-Crusoe 12 GWh deal are the primary trigger events for the 'surging' status designation.
